author: jsign
content: I have a node polling for execution witness, but just looked into it now and got RPC 500 status errors so unfortunately have a gap for that block.

author: chfast
content: I'm currently investigating missing data in reth witness. Any know issues? in my case a target of BALANCE is missing in witness.keys

author: chfast
content: No keys in the new witness format?

author: jsign
content: The things I found in Reth witness generation were mostly more things than needed added to `state` and `codes` fields.

author: jsign
content: Yeah we don't have `keys` field in the spec format since technically isn't needed in a canonical execution witness.

author: chfast
content: What is "canonical execution witness"? And why reth format needs keys?

author: kevaundray
content:
> canonical execution witness"
Its a minimal execution witness essentially

>  And why reth format needs keys
I don't think it was used, you can use it to do all of the state checks upfront

author: chfast
content: We do use it. But I'm not witness expert.

author: kevaundray
content: what do you use it for?

author: kevaundray
content: Ethrex also used it, though they are making a small change to remove it
